meaning: 只有勤劳和智慧才能带来真正的安全与幸福，捷径往往伴随着巨大的风险。
characterDescription: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak.
styleDescription: Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.

scenes.title: 猪兄弟们出发啦
scenes.description: 阳光明媚的早晨，三只小猪背着小行囊，站在森林边缘，向妈妈挥手告别，准备开始独立生活。背景是郁郁葱葱的草地和远处的森林。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., Three cute pigs standing at the edge of a sunny forest, waving goodbye to their mother (a gentle old pig). The smallest pig wears red stripes, the middle one wears green plaid, the largest wears yellow denim. Bright morning light, lush green grass, soft clouds, classic storybook illustration style., Wide shot showing the three pigs in a row, facing forward, with the forest background leading the eye into the distance. Low angle to make them look determined., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 猪宝宝们长大了，要离开家去独立生活。猪老大说：‘我要建个舒服的房子！’猪老二说：‘我要建个漂亮的房子！’猪老三说：‘我要建个最坚固的房子！’
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot showing the three pigs in a row, facing forward, with the forest background leading the eye into the distance. Low angle to make them look determined.

scenes.title: 稻草房建成
scenes.description: 第一只小猪正在用金黄色的稻草搭建房子。他看起来很轻松，一边哼歌一边插草，房子看起来歪歪扭扭但很温暖。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., The first pig (in red stripes) building a house out of golden straw. He looks happy and relaxed, humming a tune. The straw hut is simple and rustic. Sunlight shines on the straw. Soft focus background of a meadow. Classic storybook illustration style., Medium close-up of Piglet 1 working with straw. Emphasize the texture of the dry grass and his cheerful expression. Warm yellow tones., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 猪老大找来了稻草，没过几天就盖好了稻草房。‘真快呀！’他笑着说，‘我可以躺在里面睡大觉了。’
scenes.compositionHint: Medium close-up of Piglet 1 working with straw. Emphasize the texture of the dry grass and his cheerful expression. Warm yellow tones.

scenes.title: 木头房落成
scenes.description: 第二只小猪正在搬运原木搭建木屋。他比哥哥多花了一些时间，房子已经初具规模，有窗户和门，看起来很温馨。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., The second pig (in green plaid) building a wooden house. He is stacking logs, looking focused but still playful. The wooden cabin has a door and window. Forest background with fallen trees. Warm brown and green tones. Classic storybook illustration style., Mid-shot showing Piglet 2 arranging wood blocks. Show the structure of the house taking shape. Natural daylight filtering through trees., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 猪老二觉得稻草太轻，便找来木头盖了一座小木屋。‘虽然累一点，但比稻草房结实多了！’他擦了擦汗，满意地看着自己的新家。
scenes.compositionHint: Mid-shot showing Piglet 2 arranging wood blocks. Show the structure of the house taking shape. Natural daylight filtering through trees.

scenes.title: 砖房坚固
scenes.description: 第三只小猪在辛勤地砌砖墙。他的衣服上沾满了泥浆，表情认真坚定。砖房已经建到屋顶高度，非常稳固，旁边堆着红砖。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., The third pig (in yellow denim) diligently laying red bricks to build a solid brick house. Sweat on his forehead, serious expression. Piles of red bricks nearby. The house is sturdy with a chimney. Earthy tones, detailed texture of bricks. Classic storybook illustration style., Close-up on Piglet 3’s hands laying bricks, then pulling back to show the sturdy wall. Focus on the effort and strength. Cool morning light contrasting with the red bricks., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 猪老三不怕辛苦，一块块砖地砌起来。大哥嘲笑他太慢，二哥说他太累，但他知道：‘只有坚固的房子，才能保护我。’
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up on Piglet 3’s hands laying bricks, then pulling back to show the sturdy wall. Focus on the effort and strength. Cool morning light contrasting with the red bricks.

scenes.title: 大灰狼来袭
scenes.description: 一只凶猛的大灰狼出现在画面左侧，对着猪老大的稻草房吹气。稻草房的墙壁开始晃动，第一只小猪惊恐地看着前方。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., A big grey wolf standing outside a flimsy straw house, blowing hard with puffed cheeks. The straw house is bending. The first pig inside looks terrified. Dynamic wind lines, dramatic lighting. Classic storybook illustration style., Side view showing the wolf on the left and the fragile house on the right. Use motion lines to show the force of the breath. High contrast between the dark wolf and bright straw., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 大灰狼来了！他跑到稻草房前，深吸一口气——呼！稻草房摇摇晃晃，猪老大吓得大叫：‘快跑啊！’
scenes.compositionHint: Side view showing the wolf on the left and the fragile house on the right. Use motion lines to show the force of the breath. High contrast between the dark wolf and bright straw.

scenes.title: 木屋告急
scenes.description: 两只小猪逃到了猪老二的木屋里。大灰狼站在木屋前，龇牙咧嘴，准备撞门。木头房子发出嘎吱声，两只小猪躲在角落里发抖。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., The wolf trying to break down the wooden door of the second pig's house. The two smaller pigs are huddled together inside, looking scared through the window. The wolf is aggressive, claws on the wood. Tense atmosphere, dimmer lighting. Classic storybook illustration style., Interior shot looking out the window at the wolf, or exterior shot focusing on the door being threatened. Emphasize the fear of the pigs and the threat of the wolf., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 两只小猪逃进了二哥的木屋。大灰狼追了上来，‘砰！砰！砰！’撞着木门。‘我要把你们全都吃掉！’
scenes.compositionHint: Interior shot looking out the window at the wolf, or exterior shot focusing on the door being threatened. Emphasize the fear of the pigs and the threat of the wolf.

scenes.title: 奔向砖房
scenes.description: 两只小猪惊慌失措地跑出木屋，奔向远处的砖房。大灰狼在后面紧追不舍。画面充满动感，尘土飞扬。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., Two pigs running frantically towards the brick house in the distance, with the wolf chasing closely behind. Create a sense of speed and urgency., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: ‘砰！’木头房子被撞开了！三只小猪撒腿就跑，一直跑到猪老三的砖房前。‘快开门！快开门！’
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle tracking shot following the pigs running towards the foreground where the brick house is visible in the background. Create a sense of speed and urgency.

scenes.title: 狼吹砖房
scenes.description: 大灰狼来到坚固的红砖房前，用力吹气，但砖房纹丝不动。他的脸憋得通红，眼镜都歪了，显得滑稽又无力。

Focus on the wolf's facial expression showing strain., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 大灰狼来到砖房前，使出全身力气吹——可是，砖房子连动都没动一下！他累得气喘吁吁，却无可奈何。
scenes.compositionHint: Frontal view of the wolf pushing/blowing against the wall. The house should look impenetrable. Focus on the wolf's facial expression showing strain.

scenes.title: 烟囱逃生
scenes.description: 大灰狼爬上屋顶，试图从烟囱钻进去。而猪老三在壁炉里烧开了滚烫的水锅，锅盖微微冒热气。三只小猪在屋内紧张地看着上方。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Inside, the third pig is preparing a pot of boiling water on the fireplace. Steam rising from the pot. Tension builds. Warm firelight illuminating the interior. Classic storybook illustration style., Split composition or perspective from inside looking up at the chimney, or outside showing the wolf on the roof and the pot below. Highlight the danger and the prepared trap., Classic children's picture book illustration style, soft watercolor textures mixed with detailed pencil lines, warm and inviting color palette, cozy atmosphere, high quality, 4k resolution, gentle lighting.
scenes.narration: 大灰狼想从烟囱爬进来。猪老三早有准备，在壁炉上放了一口滚烫的水锅。‘嘿嘿，来吧！’
scenes.compositionHint: Split composition or perspective from inside looking up at the chimney, or outside showing the wolf on the roof and the pot below. Highlight the danger and the prepared trap.

scenes.title: 恶狼落网
scenes.description: 大灰狼从烟囱掉进锅里，发出一声惨叫，跳窗逃跑。画面中可以看到他狼狈逃窜的背影，三只小猪在屋内欢呼庆祝。
scenes.prompt: Piglet 1: A small pig with light pink skin, wearing a red striped shirt and blue overalls, looking diligent and smart. Piglet 2: A medium-sized pig with light pink skin, wearing a green plaid shirt and brown suspenders, looking carefree but hardworking. Piglet 3: A larger pig with slightly darker pink skin, wearing a yellow t-shirt and denim jeans, looking strong, sturdy, and reliable. Wolf: A large grey wolf with sharp teeth, wild fur, and cunning eyes, wearing a dark purple cloak., The wolf jumping out of the window in pain and surprise, running away into the night. Inside, the three pigs are cheering and hugging each other. Firelight, safe and cozy atmosphere. The wolf looks dizzy and defeated. scenes.narration: ‘嗷呜！’大灰狼烫得跳了起来，摔了个四脚朝天，再也不敢回来了。三只小猪终于安全了！
scenes.compositionHint: Action shot capturing the moment the wolf flees. The pigs in the foreground are celebrating. Contrast the chaos outside with the joy inside.

scenes.title: 团结与勤劳
scenes.description: 夜晚，三只小猪坐在温暖的砖房里，吃着美味的晚餐，窗外月光皎洁。他们脸上洋溢着幸福和安全的笑容，彼此拥抱。

scenes.narration: 猪老大和猪老二不好意思地说：‘谢谢你，老三！’猪老三笑着说：‘只要勤劳、聪明，我们才能战胜困难。’
scenes.compositionHint: Warm interior shot, framing the pigs together. Soft lighting from the lamp and moonlight. Focus on their expressions of relief and joy.

scenes.description: 寓意页。画面中央是一个由砖块堆砌成的心形或房子形状，周围环绕着阳光和花朵。文字清晰，背景柔和梦幻。

scenes.narration: 这个故事告诉我们：不要怕吃苦，要用智慧和勤劳去建造自己的未来，这样才能拥有真正的安全和幸福。
